title: Telegram callback_query not triggering workflow
symptom: The workflow does not start when a user pushes an inline button, despite having the callback_query trigger set up.
not_this_if: Using multiple Telegram triggers for one bot
root_cause: The Telegram API allows only one webhook per bot, and if the webhook is incorrectly set, the callback_query events will not be received by n8n, preventing the workflow from triggering.
fix_steps: Delete the existing webhook using the Telegram API endpoint: https://api.telegram.org/botTOKEN/deleteWebhook
Re-activate the workflow in n8n to set the webhook correctly
agent_instruction: Delete the existing Telegram webhook and re-activate the workflow to ensure proper setup.
